title: Evidence Boundaries and Adoption Limits
subtitle: What current evidence supports, what remains open, and what resistance still needs documentation
summary: Evidence-boundary entry for the Sutton SignWriting Evidence and Adoption series.
synopsis: This entry states the limits of current SignWriting evidence as a first-class part of the empirical lane. It distinguishes documented use from outcome claims, names underdocumented adoption limits and negative cases, and keeps Brazil and South Korea from being overgeneralized.
